title: The Krieg Pirates Bring War to the Baratie
description: On pages 8–11, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're more than prepared to handle any customer that might come!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you're finished with your meal,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How about having an iron dessert!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Agh, damn it. I ended up destroying the entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The owner's gonna have my head for this...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's just collateral damage from protecting the restaurant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What're you planning to do with his underlings on the ship?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well... maybe we oughta butter his ship up and roast it with fire...?

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
